question: Does the Route 203 stop list now display 'Arts Center' instead of 'City Library'?
Is the entry 'Central Park (Metro Link)' updated to read exactly 'Central Park [Metro-Link]' with square brackets and a hyphen?
Does the fare table column header now read 'Smart Card' instead of 'Transit Card'?
Is the text 'Central Park [Metro-Link]' contained on a single line without wrapping?
Is the new text 'Arts Center' correctly left-aligned and baseline-aligned with the other stops in the list?
Does the font style, weight, and color of 'Arts Center' match the surrounding Route 203 stop names?
Does the 'Smart Card' header match the font style, weight, and alignment of the adjacent 'Cash' header?
Are the square brackets and hyphen in 'Central Park [Metro-Link]' rendered with proper kerning and spacing?
Are the unedited Route 203 stops (e.g., Tech Park, Innovation Tower, Sports Complex) completely unchanged?
Is the Route 101 section (header and stop list) completely unchanged?
Are the numeric fare values in the table completely unchanged?
Are the white gridlines in the fare table intact and straight, with no distortion near the edited header?
Are the main board header ('TRANSIT HUB') and the 'Passenger Notice' section unchanged?
Is the edited text free of spelling errors, typos, or malformed characters?
Is the image free from visible artifacts, blurriness, or smudging around the edited areas?
Do the edited text areas match the board's laminated finish and lighting (no flat/matte look on a glossy surface)?
